_meta.source: World Athletics official PDF, extracted via wa_pdf_to_data.py

schema.data_format: Each event has a 'data' array of [points, mark_value] pairs, sorted by points descending.
schema.lookup_rule: WA rule: if a performance falls between two values, use the LOWER points value.
schema.direction: 'min' = smaller mark is better (time), 'max' = larger mark is better (distance/points)
schema.mixed_relays: Codes '4x400mix' and '4x400mix sh' appear in BOTH M and W sections with identical values, mirroring the official PDF structure.
